content.full_text:
November 13, 1991

Jeffrey A. Walter
Walter & Pistole, a.p.c.
Waterfall Towers
2455 Bennett Valley Road, Suite 201B
Santa Rosa, California 95404

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-91-480

Dear Mr. Walter:

This will confirm our telephone conversation of yesterday afternoon wherein you told me that you wished to withdraw the above-referenced request for advice regarding the Political Reform Act.

Additionally, pursuant to our conversation, I have faxed a printout of summaries of past advice pertaining to the "public generally" exception to the conflict of interest rules. You will contact us for copies of any letters which appear to you to be pertinent to the circumstance of the officials you represent.

Please feel free to write again for guidance once you have reviewed the past advice on "public generally."

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Susan L. Bobrow
Counsel, Legal Division
